answers.supported_exploration: I really loved that it was all connected in a circle, usually I use data visualizations for WOW and i find it difficult sometimes to take into account, mentally (comprehend them as a union of things rather than separate charts) separate charts. I felt like its circluar structure made it really easy to understand and compare, since it was easy to get used to and understand when you got the feel for it.
answers.first_change: maybe custom notes in the process view, so i can customize my experience even further as i play the game. i could take note of equipment quests etc and like write who did good where or elements of the build that weren't good that i should change. like to give an explanation of why this build in the process wasnt working, for my self.
answers.changed_normal_planning: i felt it was easier to compare between build more than I am used to (I mostly use tools for WoW). its hard to get used to barcharts for this then in the there window is this, now compare each build. this way i feel as its connected, and takes the least amount of effort from me once i get a hold of how it works. i also like that the layers were similar with the percentiles.
answers.blocked_exploration: I'm new to the game, i wish there were more detailed descriptions in the build planner. i liked that the circle was mostly overview but i really wanted richer information in the build planner. I found myself going to wikis a lot, which was  a good thing i guess because i had fun and learned a lot about the game, so i guess id like there to my wiki hyperlinks next to some elements.
